CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,900.00 FILED BY CHENIER BELVA MARIE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT QUIGLEY JOY L ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
